_meta.description: Index of noon (noon Partners) report tables ingested by the reporting server. Query with query_report_data using a noon store ref (e.g. myStore-AE); scoping is by project_code (resolved from the caller's connected noon accounts), not store_id.
_meta.cadence: exports twice daily 04:00+16:00 UTC (all four: 0 4,16 * * *); catalog daily 05:00 UTC
_meta.notes: Marketplace is NOT auto-injected from the store suffix for noon — add an explicit filter. orders+finance are project-wide single reports sliced per-row (orders: market_place_country_code; finance: marketplace derived from contract_title NOON-XX). fbn_aging+product_views are exported per marketplace. fbn_aging key includes partner_barcode (a sku has many barcodes; sku may be empty with partner_barcode=UNIDENTIFIED). rpt_noon_catalog is a paginated JSON GET (not an Export) — project-wide, marketplace=ALL.

tables.description: noon order items: status, fulfillment (is_fulfilled_by_noon), shipment_nr/awb_nr, delivery windows. marketplace = per-row country.

Item-level finance transactions, all money VAT-inclusive numeric(16,2). Project-wide single report; marketplace derived per-row from contract_title (NOON-AE->AE) — filter marketplace or contract_title. Sum total for net payout.

Daily FBN inventory aging snapshot per marketplace. One row per partner_barcode (a sku can have many; sku may be empty with partner_barcode=UNIDENTIFIED). Single 181-365d bucket (quantity_181_365d). Query latest snapshot for current stock.
tables.current_stock: filter snapshot_date = MAX(snapshot_date); report_date='latest' is WRONG (one pull holds ~1yr of month-end snapshots, all stamped same report_date -> sums them)

tables.description: Daily product views & sales per marketplace. asp_shipped is a PRICE not a percent; conversion_visitors_percentage can exceed 100; sales columns sparse.

tables.event_date_column: report_date (= last date the row was seen in a pull)
tables.description: FBN-eligible product catalog: partner_sku <-> noon sku, title, storage_type enum, CDN image_url. The noon image/title lookup — JOIN on sku (or partner_sku) to add =IMAGE() thumbnail columns, exactly like the Amazon catalog pattern. Rolling UPSERT: current catalog = WHERE report_date = MAX(report_date); rows absent from newer pulls keep their old report_date (delisted items).
tables.image_pattern: write partner_sku+sku+title+image_url to a hidden _raw_noon_catalog helper tab; column A of the visible tab uses MAP/ARRAYFORMULA IMAGE() joined by sku with IDENTICAL WHERE/ORDER/LIMIT as the data spill (see sellersheet-sheets reference/image-pattern.md)
